query:
-- Check if there's a customer for the ABB services with addresses
SELECT c.externalId, c.name, c.siteAddress, c.businessName
FROM customers c
WHERE c.name LIKE '%Burleigh%' OR c.siteAddress LIKE '%Burleigh%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Frankston%' OR c.siteAddress LIKE '%Frankston%'
   OR c.name LIKE '%Cash Centre%' OR c.siteAddress LIKE '%Nepean%'
LIMIT 10;
